## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation where you felt something was missing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots here.
